title: The Witcher 3 Gwent Cards and Play Data
note: 卡牌数据用于本地学习和小程序模拟。卡牌名称、阵营、战力、行、能力、获取来源已按公开资料整理；小程序实现核心规则，少量复杂效果采用自动化/简化处理。 图片资源已本地化到 assets/card-images，运行时不依赖外网卡图。
sources: gwentcards 卡牌清单（已离线整理）
公开卡牌攻略资料（已离线整理）
Skellige 卡牌资料（已离线整理）
Hearts of Stone 卡牌资料（已离线整理）

rules.deckBuilding: 每名玩家选择一个阵营和一张该阵营领袖牌；卡组由本阵营单位牌、Neutral 中立牌、Weather/Special 特殊牌组成。巫师3原规则要求至少 22 张单位牌，特殊牌通常最多 10 张。
rules.match: 一局三回合，两胜者获胜；开局抽 10 张手牌，之后通常不自动补牌。玩家轮流打出一张牌或选择放弃本回合。双方都放弃后结算当前回合总战力。
rules.rows: 战场分 Close/Melee 近战、Ranged 远程、Siege 攻城三行。单位牌只能打到允许的行，Agile 可选择近战或远程。
rules.weather: Biting Frost 影响近战，Impenetrable Fog 影响远程，Torrential Rain 影响攻城，Skellige Storm 影响远程和攻城；被影响的非英雄单位基础战力按 1 计算，Clear Weather 清除天气。

commonAbilities.Hero: 不受天气、特殊牌和大多数能力影响。
commonAbilities.Spy: 打到对方场上并计入对方分数，自己抽 2 张牌。
commonAbilities.Medic: 从己方弃牌堆复活一张非英雄单位牌。
commonAbilities.Tight Bond: 同名同能力单位在同一行时按数量倍增。
commonAbilities.Morale Boost: 同一行其它非英雄单位 +1。
commonAbilities.Scorch: 烧毁满足条件的最高战力非英雄牌。
commonAbilities.Commanders Horn: 指定己方一行战力翻倍。
commonAbilities.Berserker/Mardroeme: Mardroeme 可让同一行 Berserker 转化为更高战力单位。

factionPerks.Northern Realms: 赢得一个回合后抽 1 张牌。
factionPerks.Nilfgaardian Empire: 平局时由尼弗迦德获胜；双方都是尼弗迦德时仍为平局。
factionPerks.Scoia'tael: 可决定谁先手；本小程序中默认为松鼠党玩家先手可控。
factionPerks.Monsters: 每回合结束后随机保留 1 张单位牌到下一回合。
factionPerks.Skellige: 第 3 回合开始时从弃牌堆随机复活 2 张非英雄单位牌。

cards.name: Albrich
cards.flavor: A fireball? Of course. Whatever Your Imperial Majesty wishes.

cards.name: Arachas (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: Ugly – nature's way of saying 'Stay the fuck away.'

cards.name: Arachas (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: Ugly – nature's way of saying 'Stay the fuck away.'

cards.name: Arachas (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: Ugly – nature's way of saying 'Stay the fuck away.'

cards.name: Arachas Behemoth
cards.flavor: Like a cross between a crab, a spider... and a ploughin' mountain.

cards.name: Assire var Anahid
cards.flavor: Nilfgaardian mages do have a choice: servile submission, or the gallows.

cards.name: Ballista (1 of 2)
cards.flavor: Usually we give 'em female names. "Like Jenny?" "More like Bertha."

cards.name: Ballista (2 of 2)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Included at start of game (bug: sometimes you start with just one)
cards.flavor: Usually we give 'em female names. "Like Jenny?" "More like Bertha."

cards.name: Barclay Els
cards.flavor: Our mead smells like piss, do it? Easy to fix – I'll break your fuckin' nose!

cards.name: Biting Frost (1 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Sets all Close combat units to strength 1 for both players.
cards.flavor: Best part about frost – bodies of the fallen don't rot so quickly.

cards.name: Biting Frost (2 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Sets all Close combat units to strength 1 for both players.
cards.flavor: Best part about frost – bodies of the fallen don't rot so quickly.

cards.name: Biting Frost (3 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Sets all Close combat units to strength 1 for both players.
cards.flavor: Best part about frost – bodies of the fallen don't rot so quickly.

cards.name: Black Infantry Archer (1 of 2)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)
cards.flavor: I aim for the knee. Always.

cards.name: Black Infantry Archer (2 of 2)
cards.flavor: I aim for the knee. Always.

cards.name: Blue Stripes Commando (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: I'll do anything for Temeria. Mostly, though, I kill for her.

cards.name: Blue Stripes Commando (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: I'll do anything for Temeria. Mostly, though, I kill for her.

cards.name: Blue Stripes Commando (3 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)
cards.flavor: I'll do anything for Temeria. Mostly, though, I kill for her.

cards.name: Botchling
cards.acquisitionDetails: Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper
cards.flavor: Admit your mistakes and bury them proper – else they'll come back to haunt you.

cards.name: Cahir Mawr Dyffryn aep Ceallach
cards.flavor: His eyes flashed under his winged helmet. Fire gleamed from his sword's blade.

cards.name: Catapult (1 of 2)
cards.acquisitionDetails: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)
cards.flavor: The gods help those who have better catapults.

cards.name: Catapult (2 of 2)
cards.flavor: The gods help those who have better catapults.

cards.name: Celaeno Harpy
cards.flavor: Common harpies feed on carrion. Celaeno harpies... they feed on dreams.

cards.name: Ciaran aep Easnillien
cards.flavor: The path to freedom is paved in blood, not ink.

cards.name: Cirilla Fiona Elen Riannon
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Big City Players, Novigrad Forest Camp, Scoia'Tael merchant
cards.flavor: Know when fairy tales cease to be tales? When people start believing in them.

cards.name: Clear Weather (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: The sun's shinin', Dromle! The sun's shinin'! Maybe there's hope left after all...

cards.name: Clear Weather (2 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Included at start of game OR Randomly earned
cards.flavor: The sun's shinin', Dromle! The sun's shinin'! Maybe there's hope left after all...

cards.name: Clear Weather (3 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Included at start of game OR Randomly earned
cards.flavor: The sun's shinin', Dromle! The sun's shinin'! Maybe there's hope left after all...

cards.name: Cockatrice
cards.flavor: Born of an egg laid by a cockerel... if you believe such peasant drivel.

cards.name: Commander's Horn (1 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Inn at the Crossroads, Innkeeper (can appear a 2nd time after inventory refresh)
cards.flavor: Plus one to morale, minus three to hearing.

cards.name: Commander's Horn (2 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Passiflora, Marquise Serenity (note: card could be missing)
cards.flavor: Plus one to morale, minus three to hearing.

cards.name: Commander's Horn (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: Plus one to morale, minus three to hearing.

cards.name: Crinfrid Reavers Dragon Hunter (1 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)
cards.flavor: Haven't had much luck with monsters of late, so we enlisted.

cards.name: Crinfrid Reavers Dragon Hunter (2 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)
cards.flavor: Haven't had much luck with monsters of late, so we enlisted.

cards.name: Crinfrid Reavers Dragon Hunter (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: Haven't had much luck with monsters of late, so we enlisted.

cards.name: Crone: Brewess
cards.flavor: We'll cut you up, boy. A fine broth you will make.

cards.name: Crone: Weavess
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Velen Players, Benek, Old Sage
cards.flavor: I sense your pain. I see your fear...

cards.name: Crone: Whispess
cards.flavor: I'd be your best – and last.

cards.name: Cynthia
cards.flavor: Cynthia's talents can be deadly. She needs a tight leash.

cards.name: Dandelion
cards.acquisitionDetails: A Matter of Life and Death, Vegelbud Estate, Marius Florin (final round)
cards.flavor: Dandelion, you're a cynic, a lecher, a whoremonger, a liar – and my best friend.

cards.name: Decoy (1 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside after prologue)
cards.flavor: When you run out of peasants, decoys also make decent arrow fodder.

cards.name: Decoy (2 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Crow's Perch, Quartermaster's Baron's Store (can appear a 2nd time after inventory refresh)
cards.flavor: When you run out of peasants, decoys also make decent arrow fodder.

cards.name: Decoy (3 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Seven Cats Inn, Innkeeper (note: card could be missing)
cards.flavor: When you run out of peasants, decoys also make decent arrow fodder.

cards.name: Dennis Cranmer
cards.flavor: I know how to carry out orders, so you can shove you advice up your coal chute.

cards.name: Dethmold
cards.flavor: I once made a prisoner vomit his own entrails... Ah, good times...

cards.name: Dol Blathanna Archer
cards.flavor: Take another step, dh'oine. You'd look better with an arrow between your eyes.

cards.name: Dol Blathanna Scout (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: They track like hounds, run like deer and kill like cold-hearted bastards.

cards.name: Dol Blathanna Scout (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: They track like hounds, run like deer and kill like cold-hearted bastards.

cards.name: Dol Blathanna Scout (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: They track like hounds, run like deer and kill like cold-hearted bastards.

cards.name: Draug
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Skellige Style, Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde, Crach an Craite OR automatically received (if not played before On Thin Ice starts)
cards.flavor: Some men cannot admit defeat. Some keep fighting from beyond the grave.

cards.name: Dun Banner Medic
cards.flavor: Stitch red to red, white to white, and everything will be all right.

cards.name: Dwarven Skirmisher (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: Worked a pickaxe all me life. Battleaxe won't be any trouble.

cards.name: Dwarven Skirmisher (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: Worked a pickaxe all me life. Battleaxe won't be any trouble.

cards.name: Dwarven Skirmisher (3 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Oxenfurt, The Alchemy Inn, Stjepan OR Randomly earned
cards.flavor: Worked a pickaxe all me life. Battleaxe won't be any trouble.

cards.name: Earth Elemental
cards.acquisitionDetails: Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper
cards.flavor: How to fight an earth elemental? You don't. You run. Fast as you can.

cards.name: Eithné
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Old Pals, Rosemary and Thyme, Zoltan
cards.flavor: The dryad queen has eyes of molten silver, and a heart of cold-forged steel.

cards.name: Elven Skirmisher (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: No matter what you may have heard, elves don't take human scalps. Too much lice.

cards.name: Elven Skirmisher (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: No matter what you may have heard, elves don't take human scalps. Too much lice.

cards.name: Elven Skirmisher (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: No matter what you may have heard, elves don't take human scalps. Too much lice.

cards.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Emperor of Nilfgaard
cards.baseName: Emhyr var Emreis: Emperor of Nilfgaard
cards.abilityText: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.
cards.leaderAbility: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.
cards.flavor: Your motives do not interest me. Only results.

cards.name: Emhyr var Emreis: His Imperial Majesty
cards.baseName: Emhyr var Emreis: His Imperial Majesty
cards.abilityText: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.leaderAbility: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.flavor: The skies wept when my Pavetta died. They will not weep for me.

cards.name: Emhyr var Emreis: The Relentless
cards.abilityText: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.
cards.leaderAbility: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.
cards.flavor: They do not call me the Patient. Take care they do not call you the Headless.

cards.name: Emhyr var Emreis: The White Flame
cards.baseName: Emhyr var Emreis: The White Flame
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Skellige Style, reward for completing the quest
cards.leaderAbility: Cancel your opponent's Leader Ability.
cards.flavor: A sword is but one of many tools at a ruler's disposal.

cards.name: Emiel Regis Rohellec Terzieff
cards.flavor: Men, the polite ones, at least, call me a monster. A blood-drinking freak.

cards.name: Endrega
cards.flavor: The nest! Take out the nest, or the bastards'll just keep coming!

cards.name: Eredin: Bringer of Death
cards.abilityText: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.
cards.leaderAbility: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.
cards.flavor: Go on. Show me your spins, pirouettes and feints. I want to watch.

cards.name: Eredin: Commander of the Red Riders
cards.baseName: Eredin: Commander of the Red Riders
cards.acquisitionDetails: Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper OR Included at start of game
cards.abilityText: Double the strength of all your Close Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
cards.leaderAbility: Double the strength of all your Close Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
cards.flavor: Have some dignity. You know how this will end.

cards.name: Eredin: Destroyer of Worlds
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Velen Players, reward for completing the quest
cards.abilityText: Discard 2 cards and draw 1 card of your choice from your deck.
cards.leaderAbility: Discard 2 cards and draw 1 card of your choice from your deck.
cards.flavor: It is unavoidable.

cards.name: Eredin: King of the Wild Hunt
cards.baseName: Eredin: King of the Wild Hunt
cards.acquisitionDetails: Included at start of game OR Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper
cards.abilityText: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.leaderAbility: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.flavor: I've long awaited this...

cards.name: Esterad Thyssen
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Big City Players, Bathhouse, Sigismund Dijkstra OR automatically received if he dies
cards.flavor: Like all Thyssen men, he was tall, powefully built and criminally handsome.

cards.name: Etolian Auxiliary Archers (1 of 2)
cards.flavor: Double or nothing, aim for his cock.

cards.name: Etolian Auxiliary Archers (2 of 2)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)
cards.flavor: Double or nothing, aim for his cock.

cards.name: Fiend
cards.flavor: A fiend looks a bit like a deer. An enormous, evil deer.

cards.name: Filavandrel aen Fidhail
cards.flavor: Though we are now few and scattered, our hearts burn brighter than ever.

cards.name: Fire Elemental
cards.flavor: Fire is so delightful.

cards.name: Foglet
cards.flavor: Fog creeps on little cat feet. Foglets creep over the bodies of their victims.

cards.name: Foltest: King of Temeria
cards.abilityText: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.leaderAbility: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.flavor: It is natural and beautiful that a man should love his sister.

cards.name: Foltest: Lord Commander of the North
cards.baseName: Foltest: Lord Commander of the North
cards.acquisitionDetails: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)
cards.abilityText: Clear any weather effects (resulting from Biting Frost, Torrential Rain or Impenetrable Fog cards) in play.
cards.leaderAbility: Clear any weather effects (resulting from Biting Frost, Torrential Rain or Impenetrable Fog cards) in play.
cards.flavor: Sod advisors and their schemes. I place my trust in my soldiers' blades.

cards.name: Foltest: The Siegemaster
cards.abilityText: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
cards.flavor: A well-aimed ballista razes not just the enemy's walls, but his morale as well.

cards.name: Foltest: The Steel-Forged
cards.abilityText: Destroy your enemy's strongest Siege unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Siege units is 10 or more.
cards.leaderAbility: Destroy your enemy's strongest Siege unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Siege units is 10 or more.
cards.flavor: A beautiful day for battle.

cards.name: Forktail
cards.flavor: Fork tails... Bah! Fuckers' tails're more like cleavers.

cards.name: Francesca Findabair: Daisy of the Valley
cards.baseName: Francesca Findabair: Daisy of the Valley
cards.abilityText: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.
cards.leaderAbility: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.
cards.flavor: Do not let my beauty distract your aim.

cards.name: Francesca Findabair: Pureblood Elf
cards.abilityText: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.leaderAbility: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.
cards.flavor: Ash shall fertilize the soil. By spring, the valley shall bloom once more.

cards.name: Francesca Findabair: Queen of Dol Blathanna
cards.baseName: Francesca Findabair: Queen of Dol Blathanna
cards.abilityText: Destroy your enemy's Close Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Close Combat units is 10 or more.
cards.leaderAbility: Destroy your enemy's Close Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Close Combat units is 10 or more.
cards.flavor: To live in peace, we first must kill. This is human oppression's cruel finale.

cards.name: Francesca Findabair: The Beautiful
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Big City Players, reward for completing the quest
cards.abilityText: Doubles the strength of all your Ranged Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles the strength of all your Ranged Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
cards.flavor: The Elder Races have forgotten more than humans can ever hope to know.

cards.name: Frightener
cards.flavor: "What have I done?" the mage cried out, frightened of his own creation.

cards.name: Fringilla Vigo
cards.acquisitionDetails: A Dangerous Game, Hierarch Square, Caesar Bilzen's house OR Prison Warden body during The Great Escape
cards.flavor: Magic is the highest good. It transcends all borders and divisions.

cards.name: Gargoyle
cards.flavor: Ancient sculptors' nightmarish fantasies, brought to life by bored mages.

cards.name: Geralt of Rivia
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Old Pals OR Gwent: Play Thaler, The Seven Cats Inn, Thaler OR Seven Cats Inn, top of a crate at the end of the side dining hall (no objective, use witcher senses)
cards.flavor: If that's what it takes to save the world, it's better to let that world die.

cards.name: Ghoul (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: If ghouls are part of the Circle of Life... then it's a damn vicious circle.

cards.name: Ghoul (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: If ghouls are part of the Circle of Life... then it's a damn vicious circle.

cards.name: Ghoul (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: If ghouls are part of the Circle of Life... then it's a damn vicious circle.

cards.name: Grave Hag
cards.flavor: Their long tongues're for slurping marrow – and whipping prey.

cards.name: Griffin
cards.flavor: Griffins like to toy with their prey. Eat'em alive, piece by piece.

cards.name: Harpy
cards.flavor: There are many species of harpy, and all are kleptomaniacs.

cards.name: Havekar Healer (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: Sure, I'll patch you up. Gonna cost you, though.

cards.name: Havekar Healer (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: Sure, I'll patch you up. Gonna cost you, though.

cards.name: Havekar Healer (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: Sure, I'll patch you up. Gonna cost you, though.

cards.name: Havekar Smuggler (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: I fight for whoever's paying the best. Or whoever's easiest to rob.

cards.name: Havekar Smuggler (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: I fight for whoever's paying the best. Or whoever's easiest to rob.

cards.name: Havekar Smuggler (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: I fight for whoever's paying the best. Or whoever's easiest to rob.

cards.name: Heavy Zerrikanian Fire Scorpion
cards.flavor: Not the best for taking cities, but great for razing them to the ground.

cards.name: Ice Giant
cards.flavor: Fled one time in my life. From the Ice Giant. And I'm not a bit ashamed.

cards.name: Ida Emean aep Sivney
cards.flavor: I am a Sage. My power lies in possessing knowledge. Not sharing it.

cards.name: Imlerith
cards.flavor: Ladd nahw! Kill them! Litter the earth with their entrails!

cards.name: Impenetrable Fog (1 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Sets all Ranged combat units to strength 1 for both players.
cards.flavor: A good commander's dream... a bad one's horror.

cards.name: Impenetrable Fog (2 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Sets all Ranged combat units to strength 1 for both players.
cards.flavor: A good commander's dream... a bad one's horror.

cards.name: Impenetrable Fog (3 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Sets all Ranged combat units to strength 1 for both players.
cards.flavor: A good commander's dream... a bad one's horror.

cards.name: Impera Brigade Guard (1 of 4)
cards.flavor: The Impera Brigade never surrenders. Ever.

cards.name: Impera Brigade Guard (2 of 4)
cards.flavor: The Impera Brigade never surrenders. Ever.

cards.name: Impera Brigade Guard (3 of 4)
cards.flavor: The Impera Brigade never surrenders. Ever.

cards.flavor: The Impera Brigade never surrenders. Ever.

cards.name: Iorveth
cards.flavor: King or beggar, what's the difference? One dh'oine less.

cards.name: Isengrim Faoiltiarna
cards.acquisitionDetails: A Dangerous Game, Zed's home OR Prison Warden body during The Great Escape
cards.flavor: It dawns on them once they notice my scar: a realization of imminent death.

cards.name: John Natalis
cards.acquisitionDetails: A Dangerous Game, Golden Sturgeon Tavern, Ravvy OR Prison Warden body during The Great Escape
cards.flavor: That square should bear the names of my soldiers, of the dead. Not mine.

cards.name: Kaedweni Siege Expert (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: "You gotta recalibrate the arm by five degrees." "Do what by the what now?"

cards.name: Kaedweni Siege Expert (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: "You gotta recalibrate the arm by five degrees." "Do what by the what now?"

cards.name: Kaedweni Siege Expert (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: "You gotta recalibrate the arm by five degrees." "Do what by the what now?"

cards.name: Kayran
cards.flavor: Kill a kayran? Simple. Take your best sword... then sell it and hire a witcher.

cards.name: Keira Metz
cards.flavor: If I'm to die today, I wish to look smashing for the occasion.

cards.name: Leshen
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Skellige Style, Ard Skellig, Gedyneith, Ermion
cards.flavor: We never hunt in these woods. Not even if it means the whole village starves.

cards.name: Letho of Gulet
cards.flavor: Witchers never die in their beds.

cards.name: Mahakaman Defender (1 of 5)
cards.flavor: I'm telling ye, we're born fer battle – we slash straight at their knees!

cards.name: Mahakaman Defender (2 of 5)
cards.flavor: I'm telling ye, we're born fer battle – we slash straight at their knees!

cards.name: Mahakaman Defender (3 of 5)
cards.flavor: I'm telling ye, we're born fer battle – we slash straight at their knees!

cards.flavor: I'm telling ye, we're born fer battle – we slash straight at their knees!

cards.name: Mahakaman Defender (5 of 5)
cards.flavor: I'm telling ye, we're born fer battle – we slash straight at their knees!

cards.name: Menno Coehoorn
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Playing Innkeeps, Inn at the Crossroads, Innkeeper
cards.flavor: I'll take an attentive reconnaissance unit over a fine cavalry brigade any day.

cards.name: Milva
cards.acquisitionDetails: A Matter of Life and Death, Vegelbud Estate, Vladimir de Cret (first round)
cards.flavor: With each arrow I loose, I think of my da. He's be proud. I think.

cards.name: Morteisen
cards.flavor: No Nordling pikemen or dwarven spearbearers can hope to best trained cavalry.

cards.name: Morvran Voorhis
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Big City Players, Passiflora, Marquise Serenity
cards.flavor: Summer sun reflecting in the quiet waters of the Alba – that's Nilfgaard to me.

cards.name: Mysterious Elf
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Skellige Style, Ard Skellig, Gedyneith, Gremist
cards.flavor: You humans have...unusual tastes.

cards.name: Nausicaa Cavalry Rider (1 of 3)
cards.flavor: The Emperor will teach the North discipline.

cards.name: Nausicaa Cavalry Rider (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: The Emperor will teach the North discipline.

cards.name: Nausicaa Cavalry Rider (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: The Emperor will teach the North discipline.

cards.name: Nekker (1 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Following the Thread, Faroe, Trottheim, loot Hammonds corpse
cards.flavor: Damn things are almost cute, if you ignore the whole vicious killer aspect.

cards.name: Nekker (2 of 3)
cards.flavor: Damn things are almost cute, if you ignore the whole vicious killer aspect.

cards.name: Nekker (3 of 3)
cards.flavor: Damn things are almost cute, if you ignore the whole vicious killer aspect.

cards.name: Philippa Eilhart
cards.flavor: Soon the power of kings will wither, and the Lodge shall seize its rightful place.

cards.name: Plague Maiden
cards.flavor: The sick rave about a boil-pocked woman surrounded by herds of rabid rats...

cards.name: Poor Fucking Infantry (1 of 4)
cards.flavor: I's a war veteran! ... spare me a crown?

cards.name: Poor Fucking Infantry (2 of 4)
cards.flavor: I's a war veteran! ... spare me a crown?

cards.name: Poor Fucking Infantry (3 of 4)
cards.flavor: I's a war veteran! ... spare me a crown?

cards.name: Poor Fucking Infantry (4 of 4)
cards.flavor: I's a war veteran! ... spare me a crown?

cards.name: Prince Stennis
cards.flavor: He ploughin' wears golden armor. Golden. 'Course he's an arsehole.

cards.name: Puttkammer
cards.acquisitionDetails: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)
cards.flavor: Learned a lot at Braibant Military Academy. How to scrub potatoes, for instance.

cards.name: Rainfarn
cards.flavor: You'll die as painfully as that pathetic traitor Windhalm did.

cards.name: Redanian Foot Soldier (1 of 2)
cards.flavor: I've bled for Redania! I've killed for Redania.. Dammit, I've even raped for Redania!

cards.name: Redanian Foot Soldier (2 of 2)
cards.flavor: I've bled for Redania! I've killed for Redania.. Dammit, I've even raped for Redania!

cards.name: Renuald aep Matsen
cards.flavor: They say the Impera fear nothing. Untrue. Renuald scares them shitless.

cards.name: Riordain
cards.flavor: Stare into their eyes, feast on their terror. Then go in for the kill.

cards.name: Rotten Mangonel
cards.flavor: The rotten smell brings back childhood memories.

cards.name: Sabrina Glevissig
cards.flavor: Daughter of the Kaedweni Wilderness.

cards.name: Saesenthessis
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Old Pals, Temerian Resistance Camp, Vernon Roche OR box located at Roche's hideout (has objective)
cards.flavor: Beautiful, pure, fierce - the perfect icon for a rebellion.

cards.name: Scorch (1 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Discard after playing. Kills the strongest card(s) on the battlefield.
cards.flavor: Pillars of flame turn the mightiest to ash. All other tremble in shock and awe.

cards.name: Scorch (2 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper (can appear a 2nd time after inventory refresh)
cards.abilityText: Discard after playing. Kills the strongest card(s) on the battlefield.
cards.flavor: Pillars of flame turn the mightiest to ash. All other tremble in shock and awe.

cards.name: Scorch (3 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: An Skellig, Urialla Village, Innkeeper (note: card could be missing)
cards.abilityText: Discard after playing. Kills the strongest card(s) on the battlefield.
cards.flavor: Pillars of flame turn the mightiest to ash. All other tremble in shock and awe.

cards.name: Sheldon Skaggs
cards.flavor: I was there, on the front lines! Right where the fightin' was thickest!

cards.name: Shilard Fitz-Oesterlen
cards.flavor: Warfare is mere sound and fury – diplomacy is what truly shapes history.

cards.name: Siege Engineer
cards.flavor: Wielded correctly, a protractor can be a deadly weapon.

cards.name: Siege Technician
cards.flavor: I never miss twice.

cards.name: Siege Tower
cards.flavor: I love the clamor of siege towers in the morning. Sounds like victory.

cards.name: Siegfried of Denesle
cards.flavor: We're on the same side, witcher. You'll realize this one day.

cards.name: Sigismund Dijkstra
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Velen Players, Crow's Perch, Phillip Strenger (Bloody Baron) OR search Baron's office (has objective)
cards.flavor: Gwent's like politics, just more honest.

cards.name: Síle de Tansarville
cards.flavor: The Lodge lacks humility. Our lust for power may yet be our undoing.

cards.name: Stefan Skellen
cards.flavor: My mark scars the face of our future empress. That is my proudest achievement.

cards.name: Sweers
cards.acquisitionDetails: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)
cards.flavor: And hands off the girl! Whatever we may be, we're not savages.

cards.name: Thaler
cards.flavor: Fuck off! We aren't all ploughin' philanderers. Some of us have depth...

cards.name: Tibor Eggebracht
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Playing Innkeeps, Kingfisher Inn, Olivier OR Kingfisher Inn, room next to the bar (has objective)
cards.flavor: Albaaaa! Forward!! Alba! Long live the Emperor!

cards.name: Torrential Rain (1 of 3)
cards.abilityText: Reduces the Strength of all Range and Siege Units to 1.
cards.flavor: Even the rain in this land smells like piss.

cards.name: Torrential Rain (2 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Included at start of game OR Randomly earned
cards.abilityText: Reduces the Strength of all Range and Siege Units to 1.
cards.flavor: Even the rain in this land smells like piss.

cards.name: Torrential Rain (3 of 3)
cards.acquisitionDetails: Included at start of game OR Randomly earned
cards.abilityText: Reduces the Strength of all Range and Siege Units to 1.
cards.flavor: Even the rain in this land smells like piss.

cards.name: Toruviel
cards.flavor: I'd gladly kill you from up close, stare in your eyes... But you reek, human.

cards.name: Trebuchet (1 of 2)
cards.flavor: Castle won't batter itself down, now will it? Get them trebuchets rollin'!

cards.name: Trebuchet (2 of 2)
cards.flavor: Castle won't batter itself down, now will it? Get them trebuchets rollin'!

cards.name: Triss Merigold
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Old Pals, The Nowhere Inn OR at Kaer Morhen, Lambert OR find at Kaer Morhen (has objective)
cards.flavor: I can take care of myself. Trust me.

cards.name: Vampire: Bruxa
cards.acquisitionDetails: A Matter of Life and Death, Vegelbud Estate, Gomo Seeling (second round)
cards.flavor: A vile, bloodthirsty, man-eating hag. Kind of like my mother-in-law.

cards.name: Vampire: Ekimmara
cards.flavor: Who would think overgrown bats would have a taste for gaudy jewelry?

cards.name: Vampire: Fleder
cards.flavor: Higher vampires embrace their victims. Fleders rip them to shreds.

cards.name: Vampire: Garkain
cards.flavor: Blood-drinkers and corpse eaters so foul their very ugliness paralyses foes.

cards.name: Vampire: Katakan
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Skellige Style, Ard Skellig, Kaer Muire, Jarl Madman Lugos OR search Lugos' room (has objective)
cards.flavor: Drinking the blood of the Continent since the Conjunction.

cards.name: Vanhemar
cards.flavor: For a fire mage, he's not very... flamboyant.

cards.name: Vattier de Rideaux
cards.flavor: There's never been a problem a well-planned assassination couldn't solve.

cards.name: Vernon Roche
cards.flavor: A patriot... and a real son of a bitch.

cards.name: Ves
cards.flavor: Better to live one day as a king than a whole life as a beggar.

cards.name: Vesemir
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Big City Players, Hierarch Square, Bank of Vivaldi, Vimme Vivaldi
cards.flavor: If you're to be hanged, ask for water. Anything can happen before they fetch it.

cards.name: Villentretenmerth
cards.flavor: Also calls himself Borkh Three Jackdaws… he's not the best at names.

cards.name: Vreemde
cards.flavor: Discipline is the Empire's deadliest weapon.

cards.name: Vrihedd Brigade Recruit
cards.flavor: Hatred burns brighter than any fire, and cuts deeper than any blade.

cards.name: Vrihedd Brigade Veteran (1 of 2)
cards.flavor: "Vrihedd? What's that mean?" "Trouble."

cards.name: Vrihedd Brigade Veteran (2 of 2)
cards.flavor: "Vrihedd? What's that mean?" "Trouble."

cards.name: Werewolf
cards.flavor: Wolves aren't as bad as they say. Werewolves, though – they're worse.

cards.name: Wyvern
cards.flavor: Imagine a cross between a winged snake and a nightmare. Wyverns are worse.

cards.name: Yaevinn
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Skellige Style, Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, Sjusta the Tailor
cards.flavor: We are the drops of rain that together make a ferocious storm.

cards.name: Yarpen Zigrin
cards.flavor: The world belongs to whoever's best at crackin' skulls and impregnatin' lasses.

cards.name: Yennefer of Vengerberg
cards.acquisitionDetails: Gwent: Playing Innkeeps, Oxenfurt, The Alchemy Inn, Stjepan
cards.flavor: Magic is Chaos, Art and Science. It's a curse, a blessing and a progression.

cards.name: Young Emissary (1 of 2)
cards.flavor: If I acquit myself well, perhaps next they'll post me somewhere civilized.

cards.name: Young Emissary (2 of 2)
cards.flavor: If I acquit myself well, perhaps next they'll post me somewhere civilized.

cards.name: Zerrikanian Fire Scorpion
cards.flavor: The Zerrikanian Desert used to be a lush garden. Then these came along.

cards.name: Zoltan Chivay
cards.acquisitionDetails: White Orchard Tavern, Aldert Geert OR found under the Hanged Man's Tree after prologue
cards.flavor: Life without old mates and booze is like a woman without a rump.

cards.name: Cow
cards.source: manual from published card guides + gwentcards checklist

cards.name: Eredin Bréacc Glas: The Treacherous
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles strength of all spies.
cards.flavor: I'm enjoying this. You are my toy.

cards.name: Francesca Findabair: Hope of the Aen Seidhe
cards.baseName: Francesca Findabair: Hope of the Aen Seidhe
cards.abilityText: Move agile unites to whichever valid row maximizes their strength (don't move units already in optimal row).
cards.leaderAbility: Move agile unites to whichever valid row maximizes their strength (don't move units already in optimal row).
cards.flavor: Daede sian caente, Aen Seidhe en'allane ael coeden...

cards.name: Gaunter O'Dimm: Darkness (1 of 3)

cards.source: manual from published card guides + gwentcards checklist

cards.name: Foltest: Son of Medell
cards.abilityText: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.
cards.leaderAbility: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.
cards.flavor: Dammit, I rule this land and I refuse to creep around its corners.

cards.name: Schirrú
cards.source: manual from published card guides + gwentcards checklist

cards.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Invader of the North
cards.baseName: Emhyr var Emreis: Invader of the North
cards.abilityText: Abilities that restore a unit to the battlefield restore a randomly-chosen unit. Affects both players.
cards.leaderAbility: Abilities that restore a unit to the battlefield restore a randomly-chosen unit. Affects both players.
cards.flavor: Emperors command multitudes, yet cannot control two things: their time and their hearts.
